examples: In the photo is someone most of us are familiar with, Liu Xiang, the young Chinese Olympic gold medal winner in hurdling.
Harrison Dillard began hurdling at the age of eight, running in an alley and using the springs from abandoned car seats as barriers.
Although hurdling is a sport that purely requires running and jumping, it's important to be athletic enough to do other things.
His comeback is now complete after capturing National Hunt's premier hurdling race.
Nearly halfway through the first-quarter earnings season, Corporate America is still reporting solid profits, with seven of every ten big companies hurdling over Wall Street's expectations.
